records.ety: [Gr. <?/ gill + <?/ to cover: cf. F. branchiostge.]

defs: Pertaining to the membrane covering the gills of fishes.
A branchiostegal ray. See Illustration of Branchial arches in Appendix.
notes: ☞ This term was formerly applied to a group of fishes having boneless branchiæ. But the arrangement was artificial, and has been rejected.
